summary.en-US: Dark black-violet Firefox theme with magenta active-tab and focus accents.

description.en-US: Black Violet Magenta is a dark Firefox theme with a purple-black browser frame and vivid magenta accents for active tabs, focused fields, and attention states. It keeps the browser dark while making the accent color obvious to normal humans, a rare courtesy.

version.approval_notes: Static Firefox theme. Contains only manifest.json, local icon PNG files, and README.md. No scripts, no permissions, no remote resources, no tracking, no analytics, and no data collection or transmission.
